title: Your Post Title Here
excerpt: A one or two sentence description of your post.
body:
Start writing your post here.

Use \n\n (backslash-n-backslash-n) to create a new paragraph.

## This Creates a Heading

More text after the heading.

### This Creates a Smaller Heading

Even more text.

> This is a quote or blockquote.

To add an image in the middle of your post:

[IMAGE: images/your-image-name.jpg]
[CAPTION: Optional caption for your image.]

To add a video:

[VIDEO: videos/your-video-name.mp4]

Remember to:
1. Save this as a new file with a simple name (like my-new-post.json)
2. Add the filename to the POST_FILES list in js/main.js
3. Delete these instructions and write your own content!
